name: Old Fashioned Wild Dandelion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the dandelions thoroughly and dry between two towels.
2. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
3. Combine 3 parts olive oil to 1 part balsamic vinegar; add minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
4. Shake well.
5. Pour over the dandelions and toss.
6. Serve with crusty bread.
